# Key Academic Papers on Cybersecurity D: # Sources: Publisher websites; CrossRef; Google Scholar; literature review compiled July 2026

and Governance: Risk Management, Firm Reputation, and the Impact of Successful Cyberattacks on Target Firms
column8: Successful cyberattacks cause negative stock reactions and sales decline; firms increase risk management post-breach
Text-based cybersecurity risk measure predicts cyberattacks; high-exposure firms earn 8.3% annual premium

and Governance: Cybersecurity Risk and Bank Loan Contracting
column8: Breach disclosures increase loan spreads by ~30 bps on average

and Governance: Is Cybersecurity Risk Factor Disclosure Informative?
column8: Detailed cybersecurity risk factor disclosures reduce information asymmetry

and Governance: Do Firms Underreport Information on Cyber-Attacks?
column8: Evidence that firms underreport cyber incidents prior to mandatory disclosure regimes

and Governance: Cybersecurity Risk and Voluntary Disclosure of Cybersecurity-Related Corporate Governance Information
column8: Board-level cybersecurity expertise positively associated with voluntary governance disclosure

and Governance: Cybersecurity Risk and the Cost of Equity Capital
column4: Journal of Accounting and Public Policy
column8: Higher cybersecurity risk associated with higher cost of equity; moderated by board oversight quality

and Governance: Firm-Level Cybersecurity Risk and Idiosyncratic Volatility
column8: Cybersecurity risk explains idiosyncratic volatility beyond traditional risk factors

and Governance: Cybersecurity Investments and the Cost of Capital
column8: Digital cybersecurity investments reduce cost of equity more than cost of debt

and Governance: Factors Affecting Organizations' Resistance to Cybersecurity Breaches
column8: Organisational factors including board attention predict breach resistance

and Governance: The Effect of Data Breaches on Company Performance
column4: International Journal of Accounting and Information Systems
column8: Data breaches reduce ROA and increase audit fees in subsequent years

column4: Auditing: A Journal of Practice and Theory
column8: Higher cybersecurity risk linked to higher audit fees and longer audit delays

and Governance: The Impact of Data Breach Announcements on Shareholder Wealth
column4: Journal of the Association for Information Systems
